CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-15-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2015 Continued To Jun-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Request Default Prove Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Steve B. Mains, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) DELTA COMPUTER SOLUTIONS, INC., a corporation; STEVE IKE, aka STEVE C. IKE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Defendant Steve Ike present in court.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $142,955.07
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $142,955.07
Judgment signed in open court.
